synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23319 Oracle Linux 9 java-21-openjdk bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23319
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23319

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23319.html
